---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature
title: "feat: "
labels: feature
---

## Feature Description

Describe the feature you want to implement.

## Motivation

Explain why this feature is needed and what problem it solves.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how this feature should work from a user or system perspective.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Feature implemented
- [ ] Code reviewed
- [ ] Application builds and runs
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed

## Additional Notes

Add any additional context, references, or screenshots here.
